notes: Uses Cool Farm Tool and CDM/IPCC guidelines; no native protocols, so store pointer to external methods.
Regenerative Standard page links to Soil Carbon Quantification Method versions; treat as small document family for capture.
Official site unreachable; only Croplands methodology PDF available; capture single document and monitor for updates.
Regenagri provides Carbon Standard, Guidelines, Assessment Methodology and other documents; some require contact; capture available documents and request access for gated ones.
ERS rebranded to Equitable Earth; methodologies page lists M001 (Terrestrial Forest Restoration) and M002 (Forest Conservation) with versioned documents.
Equitable Earth (successor to ERS) provides M001 and M002 methodologies and guidance documents; suitable for automated extraction.
ART’s TREES standard has versions 3.0, 2.0 and 1.0; capture the standard documents as a family.
Carbon Zero uses emissions factors from IPCC and national inventories; no proprietary offset methodologies; store pointer to external methodologies.
Credible Carbon’s methodology page lists four draft methodologies (inorganic waste, organic waste, renewable energy/efficiency, land & soil restoration) with downloadable documents.
Thailand’s TGO registry is a project database; there is no methodology page and language barrier complicates access; derive methods from individual project documents and monitor.
City Forest Credits provides a Carbon Protocols page with a standard and multiple protocols for tree preservation and afforestation; documents are accessible for extraction.
